name: Eka the Flame Buddy
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎獣使い</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フレイム・バディ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>エーカ
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up Monster Card in either player's Spell & Trap Zone; Special Summon it to your field. You can target 1 other face-up monster you control; equip that face-up monster to this card as an Equip Spell that gives it 500 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Eka the Flame Buddy" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up Monster Card in either player's Spell & Trap Zone; Special Summon it to your field. You can target 1 other face-up monster you control; equip that face-up monster to this card as an Equip Spell that gives it 500 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Eka the Flame Buddy" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up Monster Card in either player's Spell & Trap Zone; Special Summon it to your field. sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Equips monsters from the player's field to itself
Grants effect to Equip Spell Card
summoning: Special Summons from your Spell & Trap Zone
Special Summons from your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone to your field
